Templates and Static Files
==========================

Templates
---------

Django templates are located under the ``templates/`` directory. App-specific templates
are in ``templates/dispatch_app/`` and share a common base layout.

Static files
------------

Static assets are located under the ``static/`` directory.

- CSS: ``static/css/style.css``

Documentation notes
-------------------

HTML and CSS are documented using comments in their respective files and by describing
template structure and conventions in these Sphinx pages.
